combined_parallelism.reason: The benchmark used well under 0.5 GB RSS per generator/checker and no swap. Two local lanes use only a modest fraction of eight logical CPUs while avoiding shared writes.

chatgpt_vm.reason: No distinct persistent VM filesystem/toolchain was available for the mandatory one-segment benchmark.

write_policy: Each worker writes only its exclusively assigned immutable segment directories on its own Git branch and pushes every independently audited segment commit before starting the next.
aggregation_policy: A separate deterministic importer must verify ownership, manifest and code hashes, exact segment membership, formula-domain bindings, certificates, audits, duplicates, and omissions before merging receipts and running bottom-up aggregation.
claim_limit: The assignment ledger authorizes disjoint execution only. Formula and ancestor closures require imported immutable receipts plus independent aggregation audits.
